landing.hero.title: Universal Social Media Content AI Parser
landing.hero.subtitle: Extract, download, and transform content from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and 50+ platforms with enterprise-grade precision.
landing.featureIntroduction.title: Powerful AI Extraction Engine
landing.featureIntroduction.subtitle: Enterprise-grade parsing technology that supports 50+ social media platforms, extracting high-quality content with one click.
landing.featureIntroduction.feature1.des: Advanced AI parsing engine analyzes URLs instantly, extracts video streams in seconds, and delivers high-quality downloads. No waiting, no buffering - just pure speed.
landing.featureIntroduction.feature2.des: From YouTube to TikTok, Instagram to Bilibili - we support all major social media platforms. One tool, unlimited possibilities for content creators and marketers.
landing.featureIntroduction.feature3.des: Extract up to 3 videos at once without waiting for each one. Batch processing makes your workflow more efficient and saves valuable time. Whether for content creation or marketing material collection, get twice the results with half the effort.
landing.targetAudience.title: Built for Who Uses SnapVee
landing.targetAudience.subtitle: Content creators, marketers, educators, and everyday users — SnapVee makes high-quality video extraction simple and accessible.
landing.targetAudience.1.title: Content Creators
landing.targetAudience.1.description: Download reference videos and inspiration from 50+ platforms in HD quality for your creative workflow.
landing.targetAudience.2.title: Social Media Marketers
landing.targetAudience.2.description: Collect and repurpose content from multiple platforms quickly. Batch download and fast queue keep you ahead of deadlines.
landing.targetAudience.3.title: Video Editors
landing.targetAudience.3.description: Get HD/4K sources with audio separation. Perfect for reference materials, B-roll, and multi-language audio tracks.
landing.targetAudience.4.title: Educators & Students
landing.targetAudience.4.description: Save educational videos and lectures offline for study. No ads, no distractions — just the content you need.
landing.targetAudience.5.title: Influencers
landing.targetAudience.5.description: Backup and archive your own content. Download from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and more without watermarks.
landing.targetAudience.6.title: Personal Users
landing.targetAudience.6.description: Save your favorite videos for offline viewing. Simple, fast, and works on any device with a browser.
landing.testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
landing.testimonials.subtitle: Typical user experiences with SnapVee.
landing.testimonials.disclaimer: * Names and scenarios are illustrative examples
landing.testimonials.0.content: SnapVee is a game-changer! I can download videos from YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram in seconds. The quality is amazing and it supports so many platforms. Perfect for my content creation workflow!
landing.testimonials.0.name: Alex Chen
landing.testimonials.1.content: As a social media manager, I need to download content from multiple platforms daily. SnapVee makes it so easy - just paste the link and download. The priority queue feature is a lifesaver during busy periods!
landing.testimonials.1.name: Sarah Johnson
landing.testimonials.2.content: The video quality is outstanding! I use SnapVee to download reference videos for my editing projects. It supports HD quality and works with all the platforms I need. Highly recommended!
landing.testimonials.2.name: Mike Zhang
landing.testimonials.3.content: SnapVee has streamlined our marketing workflow. We can quickly download and repurpose content from various social platforms. The API access in Pro plan is perfect for our automation needs!
landing.testimonials.3.name: Lisa Wang
landing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
landing.faq.subtitle: Quick answers to your questions about SnapVee.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.tips3: What content types can I download?
faq.subTips1: Free plan includes 1 download per day. Invite a friend to earn 2 bonus downloads. Upgrade to Basic ($29.99 Early Bird or $39.99 regular, one-time payment) for unlimited downloads.
faq.subTips2: We support 50+ platforms including YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Facebook, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, and many more. Our platform list is constantly updated to include new social media platforms. If a platform is not supported, please join our Telegram group to provide feedback and request support.
faq.subTips3: Three content types: Videos (with HD quality options), Images (single or batch download), Audio-only (extracted from videos). Cover art and thumbnails available for some platforms.
faq.subTips4: Three simple steps: 1. Copy the social media URL 2. Paste into the input box on our download page 3. Select format & quality, then download. No software installation required - works directly in your browser.
faq.subTips5: Files save directly to your device: Desktop → "Downloads" folder; Mobile → System download manager or browser download history. To provide a better service experience, we temporarily cache video files (typically auto-deleted within 24 hours) for download processing only. You can contact us anytime to request deletion of your data.
faq.subTips6: Free plan requires account registration (1 download per day). Basic and Pro plans also require accounts for unlimited downloads and priority features. Registration is quick and secure.
faq.subTips7: Triple security: 1. We don't track your browsing behavior or sell your data 2. Full HTTPS encrypted connections 3. Strict privacy protection mechanisms. We only collect the minimum information necessary to provide our service. Video files are only used for download processing. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for details.
faq.subTips8: Usually caused by platform updates or URL format changes. Try: 1. Check URL format is correct 2. Refresh page & retry 3. Contact support or join our Telegram group for assistance
faq.tips9: What is the Early Bird plan?
faq.subTips9: Early Bird is a limited-time offer for the first 500 Basic plan purchases. You'll get the Basic plan at $29.99 (regular price $39.99) with exclusive Early Adopter badge (#0001-#0500), permanent price protection, priority feature access, and exclusive community access. Once the 500 spots are filled, the price returns to $39.99.
faq.tips10: Are there file size or duration limits?
faq.subTips10: For videos longer than 1 hour or files larger than 500MB, processing may take longer or may not be supported on some platforms. We recommend checking the platform's original file size and duration before downloading. Large files may require more processing time.
faq.tips11: What if a platform is not supported?
faq.subTips11: We continuously add support for new platforms. If a platform you need is not currently supported, please join our Telegram group (https://t.me/+YJsGEv_hJKhkZWY1) to provide feedback. We prioritize platform requests based on user demand.
faq.tips12: Can I get a refund after payment?
faq.subTips12: Due to the nature of digital products, we generally do not offer refunds once the service has been used. However, if you experience technical issues that completely prevent service usage, please contact support within 7 days of purchase. Consumers in certain regions may have additional rights under local laws. We recommend trying the free plan first.
faq.tips13: How do I save videos to iPhone Camera Roll?
faq.subTips13: After downloading, the video will be saved to the Downloads folder in the Files app. Open the video file, tap the share button in the bottom left corner, then select "Save Video" to save it to your Camera Roll.
faq.subTips14: Yes, SnapVee is fully optimized for iOS and Android mobile browsers. You can use it directly in Safari, Chrome, or any modern browser without installing an app.
faq.tips15: What can I use downloaded content for?
faq.subTips15: Downloaded content is for personal use, learning, research, or fair use only. Please respect creators' copyrights and do not use content for commercial purposes or public distribution without authorization. You must ensure you have legal rights to download the content and comply with local laws. SnapVee is not responsible for users' misuse of downloaded content.

pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.faq.q1: How does the free plan work?
pricing.faq.a1: Free plan is limited to 720p, up to 20 minutes, and 1 download per day. Upgrade to unlock HD/4K, audio extraction, and batch downloads.
pricing.faq.q2: What is the Early Bird plan?
pricing.faq.a2: Early Bird is a limited lifetime offer for the first 500 supporters. You get all Pro features, 4K unlimited, up to 2-hour videos, plus an exclusive badge and permanent price lock.
pricing.faq.q3: Are there file size or duration limits?
pricing.faq.a3: Free: up to 20 minutes. Pro: up to 1 hour (4K 5/month). Early Bird: up to 2 hours and 4K unlimited. Limits can vary by platform.
pricing.faq.a4: We support 50+ platforms including YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Facebook, Bilibili, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, and more. If a platform is not supported, please join our Telegram group to request support.
pricing.faq.a5: Due to the nature of digital products, we generally do not offer refunds once the service has been used. If you experience technical issues that completely prevent service usage, please contact support within 7 days of purchase.
pricing.faq.q6: Can I upgrade to a higher plan later?
pricing.faq.a6: Yes. You can upgrade from Free to Pro or Early Bird at any time. Business/API is available on request.
pricing.faq.q7: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq.a7: We accept cards via Stripe. Alipay supports Pro (monthly/yearly) and the Early Bird lifetime plan.
pricing.faq.q8: How long does my subscription last?
pricing.faq.a8: Pro is a monthly or yearly subscription. Early Bird is a one-time lifetime plan.

onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to SnapVee!
onboarding.welcome.subtitle: Let's quickly learn how to use it
onboarding.step1.title: Step 1: Paste the Link
onboarding.step1.description: Copy the video link from social media platforms and paste it into the input box. Supports YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Bilibili, Douyin, and 50+ platforms.
onboarding.step1.tip: You can paste multiple links at once for batch downloading!
onboarding.step2.title: Step 2: Choose Download
onboarding.step2.description: The system will automatically parse video information and display available quality options. Click the download button to select your preferred format and resolution.
onboarding.step2.tip: Some platforms support watermark-free downloads with up to 4K quality!
onboarding.step3.title: Step 3: Save and Use
onboarding.step3.description: Once downloaded, the file will be saved to your device. You can use it for learning, creating content, or personal collection.
onboarding.step3.tip: Free plan includes 1 download per day. Upgrade for unlimited downloads.
onboarding.step1.demoHint: Click the link below to try:
onboarding.demo.prefilled: Sample link filled. Click Parse to start (this one doesn't count toward your limit)
landing.productHighlights.title: Core Differentiators
landing.productHighlights.subtitle: More than a downloader - a professional content extraction engine
landing.productHighlights.youtube4k.desc: Support YouTube 4K/2K/1080p HD video downloads with multiple codecs (AV1/VP9/H.264). Combined with audio separation, perfect for professional content creation.
landing.productHighlights.batch.title: Batch Extraction
landing.productHighlights.batch.descript: Extract up to 3 video links at once without waiting for each one. Batch processing makes your workflow more efficient, saving precious time.
landing.productHighlights.douyin.title: Douyin Image Slideshow
landing.productHighlights.douyin.descrip: Smart detection of Douyin image posts. One-click extraction of all HD images and background music, plus auto-generated slideshow video with audio.
landing.productHighlights.xiaohongshu.de: Exclusive support for Xiaohongshu Live Photo extraction, preserving motion effects. Batch download all images and videos, watermark-free original quality.
landing.productHighlights.youtubeMultiAu: Download multiple audio tracks from one YouTube video separately. Video and audio streams can be extracted independently for flexible editing and mixing.
landing.productHighlights.bilibiliVip.de: Supports downloading Bilibili VIP (大会员) exclusive videos, including anime and paid content. No login required.
